name: Crockpot Boeuf Bourguigon
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beef chuck, butter or margarine, carrots, onions, beef broth, red wine, tomato paste, fines herbes, salt, and pepper in the crockpot.
2. Add mushrooms and white onions to the pot.
3. Pour flour over the top of the mixture.
4. Cook on low heat for 6-8 hours or until the meat is tender.
